compare-specific-page-range-pdfs.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-specific-page-range-pdfs.description: Loads two PDF files, defines a start and end page, and compares each page within that range using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, reporting the number of differences per page.

compare-pdf-documents-page-by-page-diff.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdf-documents-page-by-page-diff.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting differences as a diff PDF.

compare-specific-pages-pdf.title: Compare Specific Pages of Two PDFs
compare-specific-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare selected pages of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, including page validation and collection of diff operations.

exclude-areas-side-by-side-pdf-compariso.title: Exclude Areas in Side‑by‑Side PDF Comparison
exclude-areas-side-by-side-pdf-compariso.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files side‑by‑side with Aspose.Pdf while excluding specified rectangular regions from each document.

exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates collecting annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configuring ComparisonOptions to exclude those areas during a page‑by‑page text comparison.

exclude-footer-areas-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Footer Areas from PDF Comparison
exclude-footer-areas-from-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular footer regions and exclude them from a side‑by‑side PDF comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-text-differences.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Text Difference Report
compare-pdfs-text-differences.description: Loads two PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf.Comparison's TextPdfComparer to perform a flat text comparison, outputting the number of differences and optionally creating a side‑by‑side visual report. The example notes that case‑insensitive comparison must be handled manually.

set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance-pd.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance-pd.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs containing scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer with a custom tolerance threshold and export the differences as PNG images.

compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that contain form fields using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring that field values are taken into account and producing a visual diff PDF.

compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and treat digital signature fields as unchanged regions by excluding their rectangles from the comparison.

compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes
compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.description: Loads two PDFs with differing page dimensions, resizes their first pages to a common size, and performs a graphical comparison using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, saving the result PDF.

compare-pdf-text-ignore-compression.title: Compare PDF Text While Ignoring Compression Differences
compare-pdf-text-ignore-compression.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that have identical textual content but different compression settings using Aspose.Pdf, producing a flat text diff that is unaffected by compression.

compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.title: Compare PDFs with Unicode Text Differences
compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's Comparison API to detect Unicode text differences between two PDFs with different language encodings and generate a visual diff PDF.

compare-pdf-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs for Font Differences Using Aspose.Pdf
compare-pdf-font-differences.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison to detect font changes as separate diff operations, and optionally generates a JSON report of the differences.

compare-encrypted-pdfs-with-passwords.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Passwords Using Aspose.Pdf
compare-encrypted-pdfs-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates opening password‑protected PDF files by providing user passwords to the Document constructors and performing a side‑by‑side visual comparison, saving the result PDF.

compare-pdfs-from-memory-streams.title: Compare PDFs from Memory Streams and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-from-memory-streams.description: Loads two PDF documents directly from MemoryStream objects, compares them page by page using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, and returns a diff PDF as a MemoryStream without creating temporary files.

generate-visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-visual-diff-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

extract-image-differences-between-pdf-pa.title: Extract Image Differences Between Two PDF Pages
extract-image-differences-between-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer and save the source, destination, and optional diff images.

generate-diff-pdf-compare-two-pdfs.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two PDFs
generate-diff-pdf-compare-two-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to compare two PDF documents and create a highlighted diff PDF saved to a specified folder.

generate-diff-pdf-with-highlight-verific.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlight Verification
generate-diff-pdf-with-highlight-verific.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs using GraphicalPdfComparer, generate a diff PDF with highlighted changes, and verify that the highlight color matches the default documentation value.

generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.description: This example demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's text comparison and generate a JSON report of the differences.

replace-changed-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF with Original Text
replace-changed-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs, extract the original text using DiffOperation objects, and create a new PDF where changed text is replaced with the source text.

compare-pdfs-log-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Log Differences by Page
compare-pdfs-log-differences.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page with Aspose.Pdf, extract diff operations, and write an audit log containing the operation type and page number.

universal-pdf-comparison.title: Universal PDF Comparison with Visual Diff
universal-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer to detect differences—including embedded multimedia—and generate a visual diff PDF.

preserve-metadata-when-comparing-pdfs.title: Preserve Metadata When Comparing PDFs with Aspose
preserve-metadata-when-comparing-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and copy all original document metadata—including custom properties—into the diff document.

parallel-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel PDF Comparison Using Aspose.Pdf
parallel-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently with Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer using Task parallelism.

compare-a-large-batch-of-pdfs-using-para.title: Compare A Large Batch Of Pdfs Using Parallel Processing Limiting Concurrency To Avoid Excessive Memory Consumption

generate-pdf-comparison-images-zip.title: Generate PDF Comparison Images and Zip Them
generate-pdf-comparison-images-zip.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, export the visual differences as PNG images, and package the resulting images into a ZIP archive.
